channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Rep. John Rose to Newsmax: Pass DHS Bill Before Trump Measures Expire
item.description: House Republicans need to get the Department of Homeland Security funding bill "across the finish line" before emergency steps taken by President Dona...

item.title: Morning Minute: 'But I Play One on TV...'
PAC Targets Republicans Over Immigration Bill
item.description: House Republicans are facing a fresh challenge in the 2026 midterms: the Homeland Political Action Committee, a new conservative super PAC targeting R...

item.title: Over a dozen Dems demand Trump admin protect Iranians living in the US
item.description: Democrats signed a letter urging the Trump administration to shield Iranians in the U.S. who cannot safely return to the Middle Eastern nation.

item.title: Ilhan Omarâs Apple Cider Vinegar Attacker Flips Plea in Deal With the Feds
Virginia Dems May Have Gerrymandered Themselves Straight Into a Legal Buzzsaw - Former AG Explains It All
Senate hopeful says US should be 'far more cooperative' with China to fight climate change
item.description: Far-left Maine Senate hopeful Graham Platner drew criticism for urging U.S.-China cooperation to fight climate change.

item.title: Special Forces Soldier Charged by DOJ for Using Classified Info on Maduro Op to Win Wager
Trump: Scrap 2020 Election If SPLC Fraud Proven
item.description: President Donald Trump intensified scrutiny of the Southern Poverty Law Center following a sweeping federal indictment, declaring that if the allegati...

item.title: Rep. Griffith to Newsmax: Court Likely to Block Va. Redistricting Referendum
item.description: Rep. Morgan Griffith, R-Va., told Newsmax on Friday he feels "fairly comfortable" that Virginia's Supreme Court will deny a Democrat-led referendum pa...

item.title: Trump admin steps up next phase of effort to protect childrenâs health
item.description: The Trump administration targets lead poisoning risks to children as the EPA reallocates unused state funds and launches new public awareness tools.

item.title: Curses, Foiled Again: The FBI Thwarts a Potential Terror Plot Directed at a Texas Synagogue
Hegseth: US 'Ironclad' Blockade on Iran 'Going Global'
item.description: War Secretary Pete Hegseth said Friday the United States has imposed an "ironclad blockade" on Iran that is tightening "by the hour," with U.S. naval ...

item.title: Newsom-backed law lets illegal immigrant child rapist seek early release again as DA urges 'stop the madness'
item.description: An illegal immigrant convicted of raping his stepdaughter was granted early parole under a California law signed by Gov. Newsom, sparking outrage.

item.title: Democrat Beyer blasts GOP plan to counter Virginia redistricting by eliminating his seat
item.description: A GOP lawmaker proposes giving Arlington and Alexandria back to Washington, D.C., after Virginia voters approved a new Democratic-favored district map...
